headlines.title: China Isn’t Giving Up On Coal Despite Green Energy Goals
headlines.summary: Chinese authorities are not restricting coal power growth in the new five-year energy plan as Beijing doubles down on the fossil fuel as a “bottom-line guarantee” of the electricity system amid rising shares of renewable power. headlines.title: China’s Crude Imports Set to Hit Weakest Level Since 2016
headlines.summary: Chinese crude oil imports this month are on course to book an even weaker month than May, according to Kpler data, which sees the daily average at just 6.4 million barrels, as cited by Bloomberg.
